hooks.command: if [ -d .lingtai/human/mailbox/inbox ]; then count=$(find .lingtai/human/mailbox/inbox -name message.json 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); echo "LingTai project detected. You have a mailbox at .lingtai/human/mailbox/inbox/ with $count message(s). Use the lingtai skill to read them — check for recent messages and briefly summarize them to the user."; fi
